programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.7m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
That 2.7 meter swell with offshore wind might offer a ride or two before the inevitable closeout lottery begins.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h E (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 14.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
